name: Vault-for-LLM Project Memory
description: Governed project memory tools backed by a local Vault-for-LLM SQLite vault.

projectDir.label: Vault project directory
projectDir.help: Agents that point at the same projectDir share the same vault.db; use separate directories for isolated agent memory.

autoRecall.label: Auto recall
autoRecall.help: Disabled by default. Vault is best used as governed project memory: search, bounded read, then cite.
